== History ==
'''New World Eclipse''' was founded in May 2013 by '''AriesLL''' after the demise of possible summer LCS candidate, [[Azure Cats]]. The team began with the core members [[Shao]] & [[Jdwu]]. Then soon after picked up [[Quas]] and completed their roster with their bot lane duo, [[otter (Brian Thomas)|otter]] and [[Huang]].

Their first presence in the competitive scene would be in a new competitive Challenger league, the [[MOBAFire Challenger Series]].
